title: senecio ephemerus
intro: Senecio ephemerus, also known as ephemeral groundsel, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the daisy family and is native to the mountainous regions of the Mediterranean. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to stimulate digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and exhibit anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Senecio ephemerus include its potential to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and ease respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Senecio ephemerus are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can be used to alleviate symptoms of digestive discomfort and respiratory distress.
